# javascript

<!-- archie:ai-start -->

> Published npm package (@openmeter/sdk) orchestrating code generation (openapi-typescript + orval), a dual ESM/CJS build (duel), and four named sub-package exports (default admin client, /portal, /react, /zod). All src/ files are either generated or thin wrappers; dist/ is the published artifact.

## Patterns

**Generated-first src/client/schemas.ts** — schemas.ts is regenerated by scripts/generate.ts via openapi-typescript on api/openapi.cloud.yaml. Never hand-edit — changes are lost on the next generate:client. (`pnpm run generate:client  # tsx scripts/generate.ts && biome format --write ./src/client/schemas.ts`)
**Orval for Zod schemas** — src/zod/index.ts is produced by orval using orval.config.ts (input ../../openapi.cloud.yaml, PascalCase, coercion). Never edit directly. (`pnpm run generate:zod  # orval && tsx scripts/add-as-const.ts && biome lint+format`)
**Four named sub-package exports** — package.json exports map '.', './portal', './react', './zod' to separate dist entry points. New resource classes go in src/client/ and must be registered on the root OpenMeter class. (`exports: { '.': './dist/index.js', './portal': './dist/src/portal/index.js', './react': './dist/src/react/context.js', './zod': './dist/src/zod/index.js' }`)
**Dual ESM/CJS build via duel** — Build script is `duel`, producing dist/*.js (ESM) and dist/cjs/*.cjs (CJS); tsconfig uses module=NodeNext, moduleResolution=nodenext. (`"build": "duel"`)
**openapi-typescript patched at install time** — pnpm.patchedDependencies applies patches/openapi-typescript.patch to the installed package's dist/; the patch must be regenerated after any openapi-typescript upgrade. (`pnpm.patchedDependencies: { 'openapi-typescript': 'patches/openapi-typescript.patch' }`)
**Biome as sole linter/formatter** — biome.json (not eslint/prettier) enforces useConst, useAsConstAssertion, noUselessElse, single quotes, no semicolons. useSortedKeys is disabled for package.json via override. (`"lint": "tsc --noEmit && biome lint ."`)
**Type overrides via openapiTS transform hook** — date-time -> Date overrides are applied in scripts/generate.ts via the openapiTS transform hook during AST traversal, not post-hoc regex. (`// scripts/generate.ts: transform hook intercepts SchemaObject nodes during the openapiTS run`)

## Key Files

| File | Role | Watch For |
|------|------|-----------|
| `package.json` | Defines the four sub-package exports, the pnpm patch for openapi-typescript, generate/build/test scripts, and the react >=18 peer dependency. | Adding an export path requires updating 'exports' AND ensuring duel emits the matching file. patchedDependencies hash goes stale after upgrading openapi-typescript. |
| `orval.config.ts` | Drives orval Zod schema generation for src/zod/index.ts; input ../../openapi.cloud.yaml, PascalCase, coercion enabled for body/param/query. | Changing the input path breaks generation if the relative URL from the package root does not resolve; orval must be run from the package root. |
| `tsconfig.json` | Strict TS config, module=NodeNext; excludes test files, scripts/, and *.config.ts; includes src/react/**/*.tsx for JSX. | scripts/**/*.ts and *.config.ts are excluded — type errors in build scripts are silent unless run separately with tsc. |
| `patches/openapi-typescript.patch` | Single consolidated patch applied to openapi-typescript dist/ via pnpm patchedDependencies; carries all local fixes not yet upstream. | Stale patch base hash after upgrading openapi-typescript causes pnpm install to fail; regenerate the patch after each upgrade. |
| `index.ts` | Root entry — re-exports everything from src/client/index.js only; portal, react, and zod are separate sub-package exports, not re-exported here. | Do not add logic or additional exports here; only the admin client is re-exported from the root. |
| `scripts/generate.ts` | Runs openapi-typescript on openapi.cloud.yaml to produce src/client/schemas.ts, applying type overrides via the transform hook. | Must run from the package root — the relative URL to openapi.cloud.yaml depends on it. |
| `scripts/add-as-const.ts` | Temporary orval workaround that transforms generated src/zod/index.ts; clearly labelled throwaway. | Build-time tool only, not imported by app code; do not add permanent logic here. |
| `biome.json` | Sole linter/formatter config with strict style rules; useSortedKeys disabled for package.json via override. | Do not add eslint or prettier config — Biome is the single source of truth for formatting and linting. |

## Anti-Patterns

- Hand-editing src/client/schemas.ts or src/zod/index.ts — both are generated and overwritten by pnpm run generate.
- Adding admin-level endpoints to src/portal/ — the portal client is intentionally restricted to portal-token-scoped operations.
- Adding new resource classes to src/client/ without registering them on the root OpenMeter class in src/client/index.ts.
- Running scripts/generate.ts from a directory other than the package root — the relative URL to openapi.cloud.yaml fails to resolve.
- Creating multiple patch files instead of the single consolidated patches/openapi-typescript.patch — pnpm patchedDependencies expects one file per package.

## Decisions

- **openapi-typescript is patched at the dist/ level rather than forked.** — Allows tracking upstream releases while carrying local fixes; the patch is reapplied by pnpm at install time and must be regenerated after each upgrade.
- **Four distinct sub-package exports instead of a single entry point.** — Admin client, portal client, React integration, and Zod schemas have different runtime deps and bundle sizes; splitting lets consumers tree-shake and avoid pulling react or zod unless needed.
- **Type overrides via the openapiTS transform hook in scripts/generate.ts, not post-hoc regex.** — The transform hook runs during AST traversal so the override is type-safe and stable across openapi-typescript upgrades; regex post-processing is fragile and order-dependent.

## Example: Full SDK generation + build pipeline after OpenAPI spec changes

```
# From api/client/javascript/
pnpm --frozen-lockfile install
pnpm run generate        # generate:client (openapi-typescript) + generate:zod (orval)
pnpm run build           # duel ESM+CJS build -> dist/
pnpm run lint            # tsc --noEmit && biome lint .
pnpm run test            # vitest --run
```

<!-- archie:ai-end -->
